name: maximum-independent-set
summary: A Python library designed to help users design classical- and quantum-driven solutions for the Maximum Independent Set (MIS) problem.
author_email: Manu Lahariya <manu.lahariya@pasqal.com>, David Teller <david.teller@pasqal.com>, Roland Guichard <roland.guichard@pasqal.com>, Charles Moussa <c.moussa@pasqal.com>
